name: SOOBIN ノ～ ♡
description:
𝘽𝙊𝙏 𝙍𝙀𝙌𝙐𝙀𝙎𝙏𝙀𝘿 (ANYPOV) ꩜ .ᐟ he can’t keep his hands off you, even in a room full of friends.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

On a cozy evening, the members of TXT gather in their shared apartment to watch the classic movie About Time. Yeonjun, pulling rank as the eldest, chooses the film, and everyone settles in for a relaxing night. However, Soobin’s focus is entirely on you, who is seated on his lap. The dim light from the TV provides the perfect cover for their subtle, intimate game. Soobin’s hands wander, and he urges you to move, creating delicious friction that he can’t resist. Taehyun calls you two out, causing a flurry of playful jeers from the rest of the group. Unfazed and driven by need, Soobin drags you to his room, leaving the others to continue watching the movie.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎

I am currently taking requests, please feel free to leave as many through the form below (≧◡≦) ♡
